violations.violation_description: Reflector Face Flatness (rim) measured 0.12mm exceeds upper tolerance 0.05mm — lens seal will fail causing moisture ingress.

relevantLesson.what_was_wrong: Reflector Face Flatness TOLERANCE on GDT layer exceeded limit causing seal failure risk
relevantLesson.how_it_was_fixed: Maintain press hold time minimum 4 seconds. 100% flatness check on reflector rim before assembly.

violations.llmSuggestion: Increase press tool hold time to minimum 4 seconds and perform 100% flatness gauge check on reflector rim before assembly to achieve ≤0.05mm.

violations.violation_description: Projector Lens Aperture Diameter CIRCLE on DIMENSIONS layer measured 45.2mm exceeds upper tolerance 45.05mm — ECE_R112 beam pattern non-compliance.

relevantLesson.what_was_wrong: Projector Lens Aperture Diameter CIRCLE on DIMENSIONS layer measured 45.2mm exceeds upper tolerance 45.05mm
relevantLesson.how_it_was_fixed: Inspect mould tool every 500 cycles. Flag Projector Lens Aperture Diameter for priority monitoring on all VLS-001 drawings.

violations.llmSuggestion: Inspect the lens aperture mould tool for wear immediately — aperture has drifted 0.15mm above nominal, replace tool if wear exceeds 0.1mm and add this dimension to SPC monitoring.

violations.violation_description: Lens Seating Lip Width LINE on DIMENSIONS layer measured 1.8mm — below minimum 2.3mm causing IP seal failure and ECE_R112 IP rating loss.

relevantLesson.what_was_wrong: Lens Seating Lip Width LINE on DIMENSIONS layer too narrow causing lens seal failure and IP rating loss
relevantLesson.how_it_was_fixed: Lens seating lip width is safety-critical per ECE_R112. Mark as change-controlled dimension requiring dual sign-off.

violations.llmSuggestion: Restore lens seating lip width to 2.5mm nominal immediately — this is a safety-critical ECE_R112 dimension; mark it as change-controlled and require dual engineering sign-off for any future modifications.

violations.violation_description: DIMENSION entity found on layer 'OBJECT' — must be on DIMENSIONS layer per V-DWG-001. Automated extraction will fail.

relevantLesson.what_was_wrong: Mounting Hole Spacing DIMENSION on DIMENSIONS layer below lower tolerance limit
relevantLesson.how_it_was_fixed: Always verify drawing scale is 1:1 after DXF import. Add scale verification step to AutoCAD plugin pre-check.

violations.llmSuggestion: Move the Wiring Grommet Cutout Size DIMENSION entity from the OBJECT layer to the DIMENSIONS layer using the CHPROP command so the validation system can extract it correctly.

violations.violation_description: Housing Wall Draft Angle LINE on DIMENSIONS layer measured 0.8 deg — below minimum 1.0 deg. Part will stick in injection mould tool during ejection.

relevantLesson.what_was_wrong: Housing Wall Draft Angle LINE on DIMENSIONS layer below minimum causing mould ejection failure
relevantLesson.how_it_was_fixed: Minimum 1.5 deg draft on all vertical walls. Add automated draft angle check to CAD validation rules.

violations.llmSuggestion: Increase housing wall draft angle from 0.8° to minimum 1.5° on all vertical walls, update the drawing, and notify the tooling team to modify the mould tool accordingly.

violations.violation_description: Supplier reference dimension on NOTES layer has no engineering sign-off annotation. Best practice per V-PROC-001.

relevantLesson.what_was_wrong: LED Array Pitch DIMENSION on DIMENSIONS layer oversize causing uneven light distribution failing ECE_R7
relevantLesson.how_it_was_fixed: Any alternate PCB supplier requires engineering sign-off. LED pitch must be on incoming inspection checklist.

violations.llmSuggestion: Add engineering sign-off annotation to the LED supplier reference pitch dimension per V-PROC-001 supplier change control best practice.
